---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new workflow rule, prompt, template, or documentation improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## What should be improved?

Describe the feature or documentation improvement.

## Who needs this?

- [ ] Graduate students
- [ ] Research groups
- [ ] Public-account editors
- [ ] Journal-club presenters
- [ ] Other

## Example use case

Describe a realistic paper or writing situation where this would help.

## Suggested behavior

What should the skill do differently?

## Why it matters

Explain how this improves accuracy, readability, auditability, figure handling, or Word/WeChat readiness.
